title: lithospermum incrassatum subsp. gasparrinii
intro: Lithospermum incrassatum subsp. gasparrinii, also known as Gasparrini's rock jasmine or Gasparrini's forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species in the borage family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum incrassatum subsp. gasparrinii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Lithospermum incrassatum subsp. gasparrinii can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment for topical use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
